zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite Grandadam於1729年3月12日出生在法國阿爾薩斯時，她的父親Nicholas Grandadam31歲，母親Marguerite Blaise29歲。她於1749年4月29日與Francis Nicholas Marshall在法國巴-爾洛索奧結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1805年3月4日在美國賓夕法尼亞州亞當斯貝維其可 堂史普享年75歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州亞當斯康內瓦格 堂史普康內瓦格 查阿培爾 巴西利卡 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite Grandadam于1729年3月12日出生在法国阿爾薩斯时，她的父亲Nicholas Grandadam31岁，母亲Marguerite Blaise29岁。她于1749年4月29日与Francis Nicholas Marshall在法国巴-爾洛索奧结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1805年3月4日在美国宾夕法尼亚州亞當斯貝維其可 堂史普享年75岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州亞當斯康內瓦格 堂史普康內瓦格 查阿培爾 巴西利卡 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Alliance with American Colonies
historicEvents.description: After the battle of Saratoga France realized that America might be worth backing. They formed an alliance with the colonies and sent naval fleets to help with the war.

historicEvents.title: The Making of the U.S. Constitution.
historicEvents.description: The Philadelphia Convention was intended to be the first meeting to establish the first system of government under the Articles of Confederation. From this Convention, the Constitution of the United States was made and then put into place making it one of the major events in all American History.
Declaration of the Rights of Man and the Citizen.

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite Grandadam was born on 12 March 1729, in Alsace, France, her father, Nicholas Grandadam, was 31 and her mother, Marguerite Blaise, was 29. She married Francis Nicholas Marshall on 29 April 1749, in Rothau, Bas-Rhin, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 4 March 1805, in Berwick Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 75, and was buried in Conewago Chapel Basilica Cemetery, Conewago Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite Grandadam est née le 12 mars 1729, à Alsace, France, son père, Nicholas Grandadam, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marguerite Blaise, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Nicholas Marshall le 29 avril 1749, à Rothau, Bas-Rhin, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1805, à Berwick Township, Adams, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Conewago Chapel Basilica Cemetery, Conewago Township, Adams, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite Grandadam am 12. März 1729 in Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Grandadam 31 und ihre Mutter Marguerite Blaise 29. Sie hat am 29. April 1749 in Rothau, Bas-Rhin, Frankreich Francis Nicholas Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 4. März 1805 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Berwick Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Conewago Chapel Basilica Cemetery, Conewago Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lei sposato Francis Nicholas Marshall il 29 aprile 1749, nel Rothau, Bas-Rhin, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite Grandadamが1729年3月12日にフランスアルサスで生まれた時，父Nicholas Grandadamは31歳，母Marguerite Blaiseは29歳であった。1749年4月29日にフランスバス-ルヒンロサウでFrancis Nicholas Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1805年3月4日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州アダムズバーウィック トウンシュイップで75歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州アダムズコンエワゴ トウンシュイップコンエワゴ チャペル バシリカ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite Grandadam(이)가 1729년 3월 12일 프랑스 알사스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Grandadam(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite Blaise(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1749년 4월 29일 프랑스 바스-히 로스오에서 Francis Nicholas Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1805년 3월 4일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 애댐스 버윅 타운시프에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 애댐스 콘와고 타운시프 콘와고 차플 바실리카 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite Grandadam nasceu em 12 de março de 1729, em Alsace, França, seu pai, Nicholas Grandadam, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite Blaise, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Nicholas Marshall em 29 de abril de 1749, em Rothau, Bas-Rhin, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1805, em Berwick Township, Adams, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Conewago Chapel Basilica Cemetery, Conewago Township, Adams, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite Grandadam родилась 12 марта 1729 г. в местности алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Nicholas Grandadam было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite Blaise, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Nicholas Marshall 29 апреля 1749 г. в местности ротао, бас-рин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 4 марта 1805 г. в местности бирвикк тоуншип, адамс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности коунюаго чапел басилика кеметири, коунюаго тоуншип, адамс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite Grandadam nació el 12 de marzo de 1729, en Alsace, Francia, su papá, Nicholas Grandadam, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Marguerite Blaise, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Francis Nicholas Marshall el 29 de abril de 1749, en Rothau, Bas-Rhin, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1805, en Berwick Township, Adams, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Conewago Chapel Basilica Cemetery, Conewago Township, Adams, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
